title: New Jedi Order (disambiguation)
content:
'''New Jedi Order''' or '''NJO''' may refer to the following items:

==[[Canon]]==
*The [[Jedi Order]], which was named the '''New Jedi Order''' under [[Luke Skywalker]] after the fall of the [[Galactic Empire]].
*The [[New Jedi Order Era]] that took place subsequent to the [[New Republic Era]] and the [[First Order-Resistance War]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]]==
*[[New Jedi Order]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] iteration of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] after the fall of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]

==Real world==
*''[[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order]]'', the Legends novel series detailing the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]
*The [[New Jedi Order era]], the Legends [[List of publishing eras|publishing era]]

{{Disambig}}
